Spending 3/5 of that leaves 2/5 of T/2, which is (2/5)*(T/2) = T/5. Wait, the assistant said (1/10)T, but that's incorrect. The correct remaining should be (1 - 3/5) = 2/5 of the remaining T/2, so (2/5)*(T/2) = T/5. The equation should be T/5 = 32, so T = 160.
